title: YOS BUS Reflex Schema
description: Schema for BUS reflex packets — automated reactions triggered by events, conditions, or thresholds.
note: Reflex packets are not yet activated. GitHub Actions integration is pending explicit gate approval.

bus_packet_id.description: Unique BUS packet ID. Format: BUS-REF-{YYYYMMDD}-{DOMAIN}-{SLUG}

trigger_event.description: Event or condition that triggered this reflex.

reflex_action.description: Action to take in response to the trigger.

target_domain.description: BUS domain to route the reflex to.

auto_execute.description: Whether this reflex can be auto-executed without human approval.
